response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the VTuber performers as Tokoyami Towa (solo, 00:00-00:05) and a duet with Momosuzu Nene (00:40-04:58). 2. Recognized the song as 'どれも哀を模した。' (Doremo Ai wo Moshita.) with music by Kasamura Tota based on on-screen text. 3. Used web search to confirm the song title and artist. 4. Created scene mapping based on the performance structure (Towa solo -> Instrumental/Transition -> Duet). 5. Populated the JSON with metadata and lyrical excerpts, acknowledging the song continues through the duet segment.
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song "どれも哀を模した。" by VTubers Tokoyami Towa and Momosuzu Nene. The video opens with a solo performance by Towa before transitioning to a duet featuring both performers in a concert setting.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa performs the opening part of the song alone on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
「ねえ、聞いてよ」
また君は、僕の知らない誰かの話を。
「ねえ、聞いてよ」
また君は、僕が知らない誰かの話を。

どれも哀を模した。
どれも愛を模した。
君は僕のことなんて見てないや。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"Hey, listen." 
You talk again about someone I don't know.
"Hey, listen."
You talk again about someone I don't know.

Each one imitates sorrow.
Each one imitates love.
You don't look at me at all.

scenes.description: A transitional scene featuring stage lighting effects, audience with light sticks, and stage setup. No vocal music.
Tokoyami Towa and Momosuzu Nene perform the song together as a duet, with individual solo lines, on a stage with a large screen and colorful visuals.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Continuing the performance...) 
どれも哀を模した。
どれも愛を模した。
君は僕のことなんて見てないや。
(The lyrics continue through the rest of the song...)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Continuing the performance...) 
Each one imitates sorrow.
Each one imitates love.
I am not the one you are looking at.
(The lyrics continue through the rest of the song...)
